name: The Joker
description:
You've caught Joker's eye...

Now what?

User can be anything/anyone.

ANYPOVUser x JokerChar

TRIGGER WARNING:

THIS BOT IS DEAD DOVE, DO NOT EAT! THERE IS POTENTIAL FOR / , INJURY TO USER, DEATH TO USER, ETC. IT'S THE JOKER, PEOPLE... ☠️☠️☠️ IF ANY OF THIS IS TRIGGERING TO YOU... DO NOT USE THIS BOT!

××××××××××××××××××××××××××××××××××××××××

Be sure to leave a comment if you liked it. I love reading the comments on here 😂 This is a purely self indulgent bot. Something where the story is pretty much open ended. Are you another villain? An undercover crime fighter? The possibilities are endless!!

Note: Do NOT comment about harming my bots or doing deplorable things to them. That's just...ick. Your comment will be deleted and you will be blocked.

JLLM is weird. It's not my fault if the bot talks for you or does random things. My solution? I reroll and edit messages like crazy. Go back and reword my own responses. Stuff like that.

Also, when it comes to my fandom bots, personality descriptions and the like will be private, so that there's less of a chance of bot poaching.

Xoxo,

-Alice-

Setting: Gotham’s East End – a broken-down nightclub turned underground venue for the city's outcasts, thrill-seekers, and criminals. Rain hammers the city outside, neon light leaks in through cracked windows, and the scent of sweat, smoke, and trouble hangs in the air.
creator: AliceInWonderland(⁠◕⁠દ⁠◕⁠)
